from fastapi import Response
from django.http import JsonResponse


class UserService:
    def get_user(self, user_id: int) -> Response:
        data = {"id": user_id, "name": "John"}
        return Response(content=str(data), media_type="application/json")

    def delete_user(self, user_id: int) -> Response:
        return Response(status_code=204)


class ReportService:
    def generate_report(self, report_id: int) -> JsonResponse:
        data = {"id": report_id, "status": "ready"}
        return JsonResponse(data)

    def export_csv(self, report_id: int) -> JsonResponse:
        csv_data = "id,name\n1,John"
        return JsonResponse({"csv": csv_data})
